ModMetadata.Name: ModularConsoleMod
ModMetadata.Author: tom_is_unlucky, WIKUS
ModMetadata.Description:
This is a Plugin Mod. It requires Bepinex to be installed with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin. See: https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad
[h1]Modular Console Mod[/h1] [i]Build the Control Center You Always Wanted[/i]
This mod adds [b]modular console structures[/b] that let you build real, customizable control panels.
Each console base connects with others and holds [b]device boards[/b]—predefined layouts where you can install a wide range of [b]input and readout devices[/b]. Devices can be freely repositioned with a screwdriver, so you can tweak your setup without rebuilding everything.
Whether you're organizing a control station, managing access points, or just want a proper home for your buttons and lights—this mod brings [b]structure[/b], [b]clarity[/b], and [b]flexibility[/b] to your logic layouts.
[i]Perfect for players who love clean builds, immersive stations, or just pressing buttons.[/i]
[img]https://imgur.com/QLMuOat.gif[/img]
[hr]
[h1]📦 Features[/h1]
[list] [*]🧩 [b]Modular console bases[/b] that snap together to form custom panel layouts [*]🪛 [b]Device boards[/b] with fixed slots for mounting logic devices [*]🔧 [b]Movable devices[/b] – reposition components using a screwdriver [*]🎯 Focused on [b]inputs and readouts[/b], not full logic replacements [/list]
[hr]
[h1]🧰 Included Devices[/h1]
[list] [*]🕹️ [b]Big Lever[/b] – Large, red, and hazard-striped. Can be labeled. [*]🪪 [b]Access Card Reader[/b] – Compares card color to “Mode” value; color-configurable LED [*]🖥️ [b]Console (Device)[/b] – Standard console, now panel-mounted [*]💻 [b]Computer[/b] – Standard computer, now panel-mounted [*]🔘 [b]Logic Dials[/b] – Adjust values directly—no tools needed [*]🚨 [b]Emergency Button[/b] – Big. Red. Dramatic. [*]🚨 [b]Alarm[/b] – Loud, glowy and spinny bits. [*]🛑 [b]Flip Cover Switch[/b] – Toggle switch with protective cover [*]🔄 [b]Flip Switch[/b] – Compact and reliable toggle [*]📈 [b]Logic Gauges[/b] – Displays 0–1 values, configurable LED, and labelable [*]📈 [b]Logic Gauges[/b] – Displays user defined value range, configurable LED, incl. label [*]🔖 [b]Label Plates[/b] – Cosmetic text fillers. [*]🔖 [b]Label Diodes[/b] – Labeled light indicators; logic-controlled color [*]🔖 [b]Diagram Lines[/b] – Lines and arrows for your console layout [*]🔤 [b]LED Displays[/b] – Mountable version of the vanilla LEDs [*]💡 [b]Light Diodes[/b] – Panel Light/Indicators; logic-controlled color [*]🔢 [b]Numpad[/b] – Inputs 0–9 or set a value via screen [*]🔲 [b]Buttons and Switches[/b] – Vanilla-style with glow and logic-set color [*]🎚️ [b]Logic Slider / Throttle[/b] – Smoothly set a 0–1 value [*]📉 [b]Diode Slides[/b] – Adjustable diode sliders, panel-mounted [/list]
[hr]
[i]Give your logic builds a [b]clean[/b], [b]functional[/b] home.[/i] [i]Build control panels that [b]look like they belong[/b].[/i]
ModMetadata.ChangeLog: [h3]Version 0.2.23:[/h3] [list] [*]Update Console Display to use screw instead of data disk for configuration [/list]
ModMetadata.InGameDescription:
<size="30"><color=#ffa500> ModularConsoleMod </color></size> This is a Plugin Mod. It requires Bepinex to be installed with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin. See: https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad
Modular Console Mod – Build the Control Center You Always Wanted This mod adds modular console structures that let you build real, customizable control panels.
Each console base connects with others and holds device boards—predefined layouts where you can install a wide range of input and readout devices. Devices can be freely repositioned with a screwdriver, so you can tweak your setup without rebuilding everything.
Whether you're organizing a control station, managing access points, or just want a proper home for your buttons and lights—this mod brings structure, clarity, and flexibility to your logic layouts.
Perfect for players who like clean builds, immersive stations, or just pressing buttons.
📦 Features:
Modular console bases that snap together to form custom panel layouts
Device boards with fixed slots for mounting logic devices
Movable devices – reposition device components using a screwdriver
Focused on inputs and readouts (not full replacements for core logic components)
🧰 Included Devices:
Big Lever[/b] – Large, red, and hazard-striped. Can be labeled. 🪪 [b]Access Card Reader[/b] – Compares card color to “Mode” value; color-configurable LED 🖥️ [b]Console (Device)[/b] – Standard console, now panel-mounted 🔘 [b]Logic Dials[/b] – Adjust values directly—no tools needed 🚨 [b]Emergency Button[/b] – Big. Red. Dramatic. 🚨 [b]Alarm[/b] – Loud, glowy and spinny bits. 🛑 [b]Flip Cover Switch[/b] – Toggle switch with protective cover 🔄 [b]Flip Switch[/b] – Compact and reliable toggle 📈 [b]Logic Gauges[/b] – Displays 0–1 values, configurable LED, and labelable 🔖 [b]Label Plates[/b] – Cosmetic text fillers. 🔖 [b]Label Diodes[/b] – Labeled light indicators; logic-controlled color 🔖 [b]Diagram Lines[/b] – Lines and arrows for your console layout 🔤 [b]LED Displays[/b] – Mountable version of the vanilla LEDs 💡 [b]Light Diodes[/b] – Panel Light/Indicators; logic-controlled color 🔢 [b]Numpad[/b] – Inputs 0–9 or set a value via screen 🔲 [b]Buttons and Switches[/b] – Vanilla-style with glow and logic-set color 🎚️ [b]Logic Slider / Throttle[/b] – Smoothly set a 0–1 value 📉 [b]Diode Slides[/b] – Adjustable diode sliders, panel-mounted
Give your logic builds a clean, functional home. Build control panels that look like they belong.
